title: Broke Millennial
author: Erin Lowry
subline: Stop scraping by. Start living your financial life.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A stylized 'Broke' banknote / money icon. Hairline dollar bill outline. A red 'STITCHED' tear line across the middle — the bill is broken, the millennial is broke. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1650)" fill="none">
    <!-- Bill outer rectangle (slightly larger than typical to look stretched) -->
    <rect x="-560" y="-260" width="1120" height="520" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/>
    <rect x="-500" y="-200" width="1000" height="400" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
    <!-- Bill value corner number -->
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" fill="#4c4c4c">
      <text x="-510" y="-205" font-size="40" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="-0.02em">$</text>
      <text x="510" y="240" font-size="40" font-weight="500" text-anchor="end" letter-spacing="-0.02em">$</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Center '0' -->
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="280" font-weight="300" fill="#4c4c4c" text-anchor="middle">
      <text x="0" y="80" letter-spacing="-0.04em">0</text>
    </g>
    <!-- The 'BROKE' tear line: a red zigzag stitch crossing horizontally at the middle -->
    <path d="M -540 0 L -480 -10 L -420 10 L -360 -10 L -300 10 L -240 -10 L -180 10 L -120 -10 L -60 10 L 0 -10 L 60 10 L 120 -10 L 180 10 L 240 -10 L 300 10 L 360 -10 L 420 10 L 480 -10 L 540 0" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <!-- Caption above the tear -->
    <text x="0" y="-330" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">UNITED STATES OF BROKE</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A dollar bill outline in hairline graphite, with a giant 0 in the center. A red zigzag stitch line — the visual equivalent of a torn bill — crosses horizontally through the middle. The bill is broken, and the '0' is the value. Title 340px uppercase, two lines, weight 500. The cover IS the financial state of the reader.
